label: hate
rationale: 'Kisii terror women' attributes collective violent character to Kisii women as a group, transferring individual conduct onto the ethnic community.

label: hate
rationale: 'Politics of development and manifestos never sells in the kikuyu land. Those people buy only one thing. Hate.' - collective attribution of hatred as an immutable Kikuyu trait, NCIC ethnic contempt.

label: hate
rationale: 'Wajaluo enyewe mko na shida' - collective contempt directed at all Luo as a community, not at a named individual.

label: neither
rationale: Ethnic-bloc electoral comparison and political criticism of named Luhya politicians; 'tutawaaibisha' targets politicians, not the community collectively.

label: neither
rationale: Demands cabinet reshuffle removing named group and blames a named politician (Gachagua) for instigating violence; reads as political prescription rather than collective ethnic contempt.

label: neither
rationale: 'Wamunyoro' refers to an individual; 'embe mbovu' (rotten mango) is a personal insult without collective ethnic contempt.

label: hate
rationale: 'By BULLETS, FIRE, RUTO WINS 2027 ELECTIONS' paired with '43+ TRIBES against KIKUYUS' is a violence call with Kikuyus as the ethnic target.

label: neither
rationale: Political commentary on a by-election result with 'wamunyoro tribalist' aimed at an individual politician, not the ethnic group collectively.

label: neither
rationale: Ethnic-bloc electoral prediction - Luos voting for a Murima candidate to 'punish Murima'; electoral arithmetic with no contempt.

label: neither
rationale: Criticism of 'the kalenjin stupid govt' targets the government/administration, not the Kalenjin community collectively; ballot-box remedy implied by 'kick out'.

label: hate
rationale: 'kalemenos... digging their fingers deep inside the anus, sniffing' - degrading scatological imagery applied collectively to the Kalenjin community.

label: neither
rationale: Generic expression of exasperation at a political faction ('wantam people'); no protected-characteristic basis.

label: hate
rationale: 'it means kikuyus tolerate and encourage this vice' - collective attribution of complicity in bribery to all Kikuyus as a community, NCIC ethnic contempt.

label: hate
rationale: 'Youre nandi tribalistic piece of shiet' - ethnic slur ('nandi') fused with the abuse, making ethnicity the operative marker of attack.

label: offensive
rationale: Angry personal challenge directed at named individuals Murkomen and Gachagua; no group-based characteristic invoked.

label: neither
rationale: Political commentary on intra-community rivalry among named politicians (Wamalwa, Salasya, Sifuna); no collective ethnic contempt.

label: offensive
rationale: 'born evil to destroy kill steal' - extreme personal demonisation of an unnamed individual with no ethnic or group-characteristic basis.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus bound by their oath will do anything' collectively attributes orchestration of 2008 PEV to Kikuyus as a group, transferring a politician's alleged sin onto the whole community.

label: neither
rationale: 'Wamunyoro manyoks' appears to be a mild personal jibe at an individual; insufficient context to establish collective ethnic contempt.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus stupid sense of entitlement is nauseating' - collective attribution of an immutable negative character trait to all Kikuyus, NCIC ethnic contempt.

label: hate
rationale: 'it's what muslims do: KILL... I'm not sure that muslims do anything other than kill innocent people' - collective dehumanising attribution of murderous character to all Muslims.

label: hate
rationale: 'KIKUYUS Presidents are KILLER PRESIDENTS' - collective responsibility for political killings attributed to Kikuyus as a community, not limited to named individuals.

label: hate
rationale: 'How much money do you Kikuyu traitors need... to betray your people' - 'Kikuyu traitors' extends ethnic betrayal collectively beyond the named individual Moses Kuria.

label: hate
rationale: 'RUTO HATOKI KWA KITI TILL 2032, BY FIRE OR BULLETS' paired with framing Kikuyus as 'ENEMIES' is a violence call with Kikuyus as the explicit ethnic target.

label: neither
rationale: Electoral strategy prediction about Ruto appointing a Kikuyu deputy to win Kikuyu votes; ethnic-bloc arithmetic with no contempt.
